description:
Modern exhibition page for a gallery/museum. This is a minimal one landing page, with asymmetric layout and typography, providing lots of space to showcase highlight pieces, provide information about upcoming events, the space and how it can be used. 
Part of the Photography Collection

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
